user_query:
I need a weekly reminders and follow-up digest that I can run locally for our revivals. Please build a small command-line tool that reads the local inputs at input/tasks.csv, input/productions.json, and input/config.json, and produces three artifacts under out/:

1) out/reminder_digest.md — a readable summary that uses the as_of_date and lookahead_days from input/config.json and includes:
- Totals: number of open tasks, number of overdue open tasks (due_date < as_of_date), and number of open tasks due within the lookahead window (as_of_date <= due_date <= as_of_date + lookahead_days).
- Breakdown of due-in-window tasks by tag and by production (only for productions defined in input/productions.json).
- Follow-ups by person: for each assigned_to with at least one due-in-window task, show the count and the soonest due_date.
- A list of overdue tasks (id, production, scene, tag, assigned_to, due_date).
- A short note listing any tasks whose production is not present in input/productions.json (these should be excluded from all counts and lists above).

2) out/reminders.csv — only the open tasks due within the lookahead window (and only for known productions), with columns: id, production, scene, tag, assigned_to, due_date, days_until_due (based on as_of_date from input/config.json). Treat status == "done" as closed; all others are open.

3) out/alerts.txt — generated by a runnable script at scripts/next_reminders.py. When I run `python scripts/next_reminders.py` from the workspace root, it should read input/config.json and input/tasks.csv (and validate against input/productions.json), write out/alerts.txt with one line per due-in-window task in the format: REMINDER [due in N days]: <id> - <production>/<scene> - <tag> -> <assigned_to> (due <YYYY-MM-DD>), and print to stdout the total number of reminders written. The script should exit with code 0.

Definitions and constraints to keep this deterministic and verifiable:
- Open task: status != "done".
- Overdue: open and due_date < as_of_date.
- Due-in-window: open and as_of_date <= due_date <= as_of_date + lookahead_days (inclusive).
- Only include tasks whose production exists in input/productions.json in the counts, breakdowns, out/reminders.csv, and out/alerts.txt; list any others under a heading "Unrecognized productions" in out/reminder_digest.md and also write their id and production to out/validation_warnings.txt (one per line).
- All outputs must be derived solely from the provided input files without Internet access.

Please keep paths exactly as specified. The goal is for me to run the script and review the digest and CSV before sending rehearsal follow-ups. All file paths are relative to the workspace directory.
